caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black baseball cap with an eagle logo, a black t-shirt featuring the text "CHECK IT", and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and faces slightly to his left, maintaining a steady gaze as he speaks. Behind him, a white wall displays yellow stars and the phrase "GRINDERS HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A screen in the background shows the word "BOSS" and other blurred graphics. Superimposed on the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" emblem. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a consistent seated position, with only slight movements of his head and facial expressions as he continues talking, while the camera angle and studio environment stay stationary.
